input.niche: Relocation clients and luxury coastal homes
input.targetAudience: High-income professionals moving from the Northeast who want a polished local expert
input.tone: Luxury editorial with warm concierge energy
input.listingHighlights: Waterfront homes, walkable historic neighborhoods, turnkey interiors, private outdoor space

summary.campaignTitle: Avery Nolan Properties Monthly Growth Engine
summary.positioning: Avery Nolan Properties is positioned as the Charleston, SC advisor who turns relocation clients and luxury coastal questions into clear next steps for high-income professionals moving from the northeast.
summary.narrative: The month balances trust-building education, local market fluency, and polished lifestyle storytelling so every post reinforces luxury editorial with warm concierge energy while moving prospects toward "Book a relocation strategy call".
